error_signature: URL parameter must be a string, got object
title: URL parameter type error in node expression
symptom: The workflow fails with the error 'URL parameter must be a string, got object' when executing a node. This indicates that an object is being passed where a string is expected.
applies_when: Using an expression to set a URL parameter
The expression references an object instead of a string
not_this_if: The error does not occur in the specified node
The expression is correctly formatted with a string
root_cause: The error occurs because the expression used to set the URL parameter is returning an object instead of a string. This typically happens when the wrong property is accessed or when the data structure is not as expected.
fix_steps: Review the expression used to set the URL parameter.
Ensure that the expression accesses a string property, such as 'result_url'.
Test the expression to confirm it returns a string.
agent_instruction: Modify the expression to ensure it returns a string for the URL parameter.
